sections.paragraph:
- Original: κράββατος

- Transliteration: Krabbatos

- Phonetic: krab'-bat-os

- Definition:

1. a pallet, camp bed (a rather simple bed holding only one person)

- Origin: probably of foreign origin

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine

- Strong's: Probably of foreign origin; a mattress: - bed.
